data.title: New feminist apparel brand, The Vibe Expert, offers bold statement pieces in US with the debut of pro-women T-Shirts, Hoodies, and Totes, available nationwide.
data.description: A new feminist apparel brand called The Vibe Expert has recently been launched in Solapur, India. The brand offers a range of feminist-themed T-shirts, hoodies, and totes that are printed on demand in the U.S. These products are now made available nationwide, allowing women to showcase their values in a bold and witty manner. The launch took place on January 19, 2026, and the brand aims to empower women through its pro-women merchandise.

data.title: Partnership between TSCP and Orchestro.ai launches Angelic Intelligence Matching for NGOs in North America.
data.description: Collaboration rolls out ethics-enhanced AI, infusing empathy into operations for consortium of North American non-profits. The Supply Chain Project (TSCP) and Orchestro.ai unveiled Angelic Intelligence Matching in Davos, Switzerland on Jan. 19, 2026. This joint venture aims to revolutionize logistics by integrating compassion into the processes, benefiting a network of NGOs in North America and beyond.
Vallourec reports trading in own shares from 01/12/2026 to 01/16/2026.

data.title: NanoB10, a 3cm Titanium EDC flashlight by Gadget On, launched on Kickstarter. Built for real life, ultra-compact design.
data.description: Introducing NanoB10, the ultra-compact and hands-free gadget designed for real life scenarios. Recently launched on Kickstarter by Gadget On, a renowned small team excelling in practical everyday gear, NanoB10 is making waves in the market. This 3cm EDC flashlight is crafted from solid materials, promising durability and reliability. The campaign began on January 19, 2026, in London, with a focus on bringing a user-friendly, portable lighting solution to the market. With its compact design and high-quality build, NanoB10 aims to revolutionize the way consumers approach their daily lighting needs.

data.title: Cover builds first all-steel non-combustible panelized home for Pacific Palisades homeowner post-fire, sets new benchmark. Los Angeles, Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: A new milestone has been achieved in post-fire rebuilding as an all-steel non-combustible panelized home based in Los Angeles received its certificate of occupancy, marking a significant development in the construction industry. The home, constructed by Cover, a local homebuilder with its own factory specializing in architectural design, has set a new standard for safety and resilience. The achievement was announced on January 19, 2026, with a video showcasing the innovative construction (view at: https://youtu.be/n5hnkmScB7c). This groundbreaking home not only underscores the commitment to quality and durability but also serves as a testament to the advancement of building practices.

data.title: Vetology AI is the first veterinary imaging AI company to publicly disclose performance metrics for 89+ classifiers.
data.description: In response to concerns raised by ACVR and ECVDI, Vetology Innovations of San Diego announced on January 19, 2026, the release of detailed performance metrics for over 89 classifiers on its diagnostic platform. This transparency move aims to address industry issues and invite independent studies.

data.title: Sense4FIT Summit returns to Bucharest, Romania on August 29-30, 2026, the premier fitness event in Europe.
data.description: A top fitness, health, wellness, and longevity event, the SENSE4FIT SUMMIT, is making its comeback in Bucharest, Romania, on August 29-30, 2026. The event is set to be a major gathering in Europe, promising an influential impact.

data.title: Forbes and the Daily Journal spotlight U.S. Marine Corps Vet and former Police Officer, Attorney Zulu Ali in Inland Empire, California on Jan. 19, 2026, discussing impacts of arrests on immigration.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in the Inland Empire region of California, families are facing not just the immediate repercussions of an arrest, but also the swift and impactful immigration consequences that can alter a person's future in an instant. Attorney Zulu Ali is at the forefront of tackling this legal intersection, where individuals risk facing significant challenges that can reshape their lives with little warning. The situation underscores the urgency and complexity of navigating the legal system, where issues beyond the initial arrest can have lasting effects on families and individuals.

data.title: US traders turn bearish on Bitcoin; price could drop to $80k from $90k amid macro pressure and weak technicals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin is currently experiencing increased downside risk due to macroeconomic influences and weak technical indicators, potentially leading to a drop towards $80,000. This downward pressure is associated with a breakdown in a rising wedge pattern.

data.title: National Investment Risk Day by Toews Asset Management reviews worst 2025 investment ideas. NEW YORK, Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: In New York on January 19, 2026, Toews Asset Management will be hosting a prestigious panel unveiling the findings of their votes on the most unfavorable investment ideas for the year 2025. As part of National Investment Risk Day, the event aims to highlight the pitfalls of speculation, hype, and wishful thinking in the financial sector. The panel's discussion will shed light on the most ill-advised investment strategies, providing valuable insights for investors. Attendees can expect to gain valuable knowledge from the panel's assessment of the worst investment ideas from the previous year.

data.title: REVA PROJECTS LLC introduces customizable shelter for arctic conditions to aid relief operations.
data.description: In Red Bank, New Jersey, on January 19, 2026, REVA PROJECTS LLC, a global design studio and producer of transitional architecture, has introduced a tailored shelter created specifically for harsh arctic environments. This innovative shelter by REVA PROJECTS is designed to address the needs of individuals in extreme cold conditions. The company specializes in providing temporary shelters to support humanitarian efforts worldwide.

data.title: Brookdale Senior Living raises $1.2M in 2025 for Alzheimer's Association, now total of over $24M since 2008.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on January 19, 2026, Brookdale Senior Living, the leading operator of senior living communities in the country, revealed its donation of over $1.2 million in 2025 to aid the Alzheimer's Association Walk to End Alzheimer's®. The funds raised this year exceed the previous total and underscore the company's commitment to supporting Alzheimer's research and awareness.

data.title: India's central bank suggests connecting BRICS digital currencies for trade, proposing discussion at a future summit.
data.description: India is proposing that BRICS members convene to explore the possibility of integrating their Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs) for facilitating trade and tourism. The suggestion comes as part of India's plan for a future summit, as reported by Reuters. This initiative aims to enhance financial cooperation and streamline transactions among the BRICS countries, which represent approximately 41% of the world's population and 24% of global GDP. The meeting will focus on leveraging the potential of CBDCs to foster economic growth and bilateral relations within the alliance.

data.title: Adversa AI wins 2026 BIG Innovation Award for Agentic AI Security Platform in Software category.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on January 19, 2026, Adversa AI disclosed that its Adversa AI Agentic AI Security Platform achieved recognition as a victorious recipient in the 2026 BIG Innovation Awards within the Innovative Products – Software sector. The accolade was given by the Business Intelligence Group, highlighting the latest group of winners for this year.

data.title: Pacific Software, Inc. completes change of control with PurMinds Holdings Inc., secures occupancy at GMP facility.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in Tallahassee, Florida, Pacific Software, Inc. (OTC: PFSF), operating as PurMinds Enterprises, Inc., confirmed the successful conclusion of its change of control and Reverse Takeover (RTO) deal with PurMinds Holdings Inc. The transaction is now fully complete, marking a significant milestone for the Company. This development signifies a strategic shift in ownership and management for Pacific Software, Inc. as a result of this RTO.
